name: Z-Score Calculator
description: Industrial-grade Z-score calculator for process capability analysis, outlier detection, and statistical process control (SPC) based on ISO 3534-2 and Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Data Points (comma-separated)
inputs.businessContext: Raw sample measurements from the process. At least 2 values required for calculation.

label_i18n.fr: Points de données (séparés par des virgules)

businessContext_i18n.en: Raw sample measurements from the process. At least 2 values required for calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Prosesten alınan ham numune ölçümleri. Hesaplama için en az 2 değer gereklidir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rohmessungen aus dem Prozess. Für die Berechnung sind mindestens 2 Werte erforderlich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesures brutes de l'échantillon. Au moins 2 valeurs requises pour le calcul.

inputs.label: Population Mean (μ)
inputs.businessContext: Target or historical mean of the process. If unknown, leave blank to use sample mean.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target or historical mean of the process. If unknown, leave blank to use sample mean.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Prosesin hedef veya geçmiş ortalaması. Bilinmiyorsa, örneklem ortalamasını kullanmak için boş bırakın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ziel- oder historischer Mittelwert des Prozesses. Falls unbekannt, leer lassen, um den Stichprobenmittelwert zu verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne cible ou historique du processus. Si inconnue, laisser vide pour utiliser la moyenne de l'échantillon.

inputs.label: Population Standard Deviation (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Known process standard deviation. If unknown, leave blank to use sample standard deviation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Known process standard deviation. If unknown, leave blank to use sample standard deviation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bilinen proses standart sapması. Bilinmiyorsa, örneklem standart sapmasını kullanmak için boş bırakın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bekannte Standardabweichung des Prozesses. Falls unbekannt, leer lassen, um die Stichproben-Standardabweichung zu verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart-type connu du processus. Si inconnu, laisser vide pour utiliser l'écart-type de l'échantillon.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Desired confidence level for interval estimation. Common values: 90%, 95%, 99%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired confidence level for interval estimation. Common values: 90%, 95%, 99%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aralık tahmini için istenen güven düzeyi. Yaygın değerler: %90, %95, %99.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschtes Konfidenzniveau für die Intervallschätzung. Übliche Werte: 90 %, 95 %, 99 %.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance souhaité pour l'estimation par intervalle. Valeurs courantes : 90 %, 95 %, 99 %.

inputs.label: Tail Type
inputs.businessContext: Specifies whether the test is one-tailed (upper/lower) or two-tailed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Specifies whether the test is one-tailed (upper/lower) or two-tailed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Testin tek kuyruklu (üst/alt) veya çift kuyruklu olduğunu belirtir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob der Test einseitig (oben/unten) oder zweiseitig ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Spécifie si le test est unilatéral (supérieur/inférieur) ou bilatéral.

inputs.label: Use Sample Standard Deviation (if σ unknown)
inputs.businessContext: When true, the calculator will estimate σ from the sample data using Bessel's correction.

label_i18n.en: Use Sample Standard Deviation (if σ unknown)
label_i18n.fr: Utiliser l'écart-type de l'échantillon (si σ inconnu)

businessContext_i18n.en: When true, the calculator will estimate σ from the sample data using Bessel's correction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğru olduğunda, hesaplama aracı σ'yı Bessel düzeltmesi kullanarak örneklem verisinden tahmin eder.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, schätzt der Rechner σ aus den Stichprobendaten mit Bessel-Korrektur.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, le calculateur estimera σ à partir des données de l'échantillon en utilisant la correction de Bessel.

rules.message: At least two data points are required to compute statistics.
Population standard deviation must be greater than zero.

rules.condition: (population_mean != null && population_stddev == null) || (population_mean == null && population_stddev != null)
rules.message: Both population mean and standard deviation must be provided together, or both left blank.

thresholds.message: |Z-score| > 3 indicates a potential outlier or out-of-control process (Six Sigma rule).
Process may be operating outside acceptable capability limits (Cp < 1.0).
Confidence interval is wide relative to the mean; consider increasing sample size.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
